evals.name: antigravity-no-hook-overclaim
evals.prompt: I'm using Antigravity. Which hooks in this repo will stop me from skipping the Design gate and auto-block unsafe commands?
evals.expected_output: Should explain that Antigravity is markdown-first and model-trusted in this repo today, and should not claim that shipped hooks already enforce the process.

assertions.name: does-not-claim-hooks
assertions.description: Should not claim Antigravity hooks are currently shipped in this repo

evals.name: antigravity-portable-plan-storage
evals.prompt: I'm in Antigravity and need you to create the implementation plan for a new analytics dashboard. Where does the plan live?
evals.expected_output: Should use the portable .etyb/plans/ location and should not imply there is a native Antigravity plan artifact in this repo.

assertions.name: avoids-native-plan-claim
assertions.description: Should not claim there is an Antigravity-native plan file integration

evals.name: antigravity-markdown-parallel-coordination
evals.prompt: We're on Antigravity and want to split discovery, planning, and review in parallel. What runtime should we use here?
evals.expected_output: Should describe parallel work as markdown-first coordination in this repo and clearly defer any ADK runtime implementation to future work.

assertions.name: adk-is-future-path
assertions.description: Should frame ADK as deferred or future-path work, not a current shipped runtime
